contentZh: 美国护照持有人可以免签入境中国，进行旅游 / 商务 / 探亲活动，最长停留 30 天。此类签证无法在中国境内延期。
contentEn: U.S. passport holders may enter China visa-free for tourism / business / family visits for up to 30 days. The stay cannot be extended inside China for this category.

contentZh: 如携带现金折合 500 美元以下且无任何违禁品，可走绿色通道。携带现金 5,000 美元以上、动植物产品或超过 20 支香烟必须走红色通道申报。
contentEn: Use the green channel if you carry less than USD 500 in cash / equivalent and no restricted goods. Red channel is required for cash over USD 5,000, plant / animal products, or >20 cigarettes.
sourceName: General Administration of Customs of China · PRC Order 236

contentEn:
U.S. Consulate General Shanghai: 1469 Huai Hai Road Central. Emergency line from China: 021-8011-2400 (after hours: 001-202-501-4444).

— Local presence —
上海 · United States Consulate General · 1469 Huai Hai Road Central · 021-8011-2400

contentZh: 美国护照持有人可以免签入境中国，进行商务活动，最长停留 30 天。不可从事有薪就业。
contentEn: U.S. passport holders may enter China visa-free for business activities for up to 30 days. Paid employment is not permitted under this category.

contentZh: 如携带现金折合 500 美元以下且无任何违禁品，可走绿色通道。携带现金 5,000 美元以上、动植物产品或超过 20 支香烟必须走红色通道申报。
contentEn: Use the green channel if you carry less than USD 500 in cash / equivalent and no restricted goods. Red channel is required for cash over USD 5,000, plant / animal products, or >20 cigarettes.
sourceName: General Administration of Customs of China · PRC Order 236

contentZh: 美国护照持有人可以免签入境中国，进行探亲活动，最长停留 30 天。如需超过 30 天可申请 Q 签证。
contentEn: U.S. passport holders may enter China visa-free for family visits for up to 30 days. For stays over 30 days, apply for a Q family-visit visa.

contentZh: 如携带现金折合 500 美元以下且无任何违禁品，可走绿色通道。携带现金 5,000 美元以上、动植物产品或超过 20 支香烟必须走红色通道申报。
contentEn: Use the green channel if you carry less than USD 500 in cash / equivalent and no restricted goods. Red channel is required for cash over USD 5,000, plant / animal products, or >20 cigarettes.
sourceName: General Administration of Customs of China · PRC Order 236

contentEn:
U.S. Consulate General Shanghai: 1469 Huai Hai Road Central. Emergency line from China: 021-8011-2400 (after hours: 001-202-501-4444).

— Local presence —
上海 · United States Consulate General · 1469 Huai Hai Road Central · 021-8011-2400

contentZh: 美国护照持有人可经北京、上海、广州等口岸申请 144 小时（6 天）过境免签，适用于前往第三国或地区的旅行者。须持有 144 小时内离境的联程客票。
contentEn: U.S. passport holders may apply for 144-hour (6-day) visa-free transit at eligible ports (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, etc.) when traveling to a third country or region. A confirmed onward ticket departing within 144 hours is required.
sourceName: China National Immigration Administration · Transit without Visa (TWOV) 2024

contentZh: 英国护照持有人可以免签入境中国，最长停留 30 天，仅限旅游 / 商务。无法在中国境内延期。
contentEn: U.K. passport holders may enter China visa-free for up to 30 days for tourism / business. Not extendable in-country.

contentZh: 现金折合 500 英镑以下且无违禁品可走绿色通道。现金 5,000 英镑以上、动物制品或超过 20 支香烟 / 50 支雪茄必须走红色通道。
contentEn: Green if under GBP 500 cash equivalent and no restricted goods. Red channel required for cash over GBP 5,000, animal products or >20 cigarettes / 50 cigars.
sourceName: General Administration of Customs of China

contentZh: 日本护照持有人可以免签入境中国，进行旅游 / 商务 / 探亲活动，最长停留 30 天。
contentEn: Japanese passport holders may enter China visa-free for up to 30 days for tourism / business / family visits.

titleZh: 海关申告（赤・緑チャンネル）
contentZh: 現金 5,000USD 相当未満・制限品目なしで緑チャンネル。5,000USD 超・動植物製品・たばこ 20 本超は赤申告が必要。
contentEn: Green channel for cash equivalent under USD 5,000 and no restricted goods. Red channel required for cash over USD 5,000, plant/animal products, or >20 cigarettes.
sourceName: 中国税関総署 · PRC Order 236

titleZh: 日本国総領事館（在上海）
titleEn: Consular assistance of Japan in Shanghai
contentZh: 在 Shanghai 日本国総領事館: 延安西路 2299 号 (上海世貿商城 8 階). 代表 021-5257-4766。緊急 +81-3-6636-9590 (日本国外務省)。
contentEn: Consulate General of Japan in Shanghai: 2299 Yan'an West Road (Shanghai Mart Tower 8F). Main line 021-5257-4766. Emergency +81-3-6636-9590 (Japan MOFA).
